<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# scripts/scaffold_dept_artifacts.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:00:26Z

## Purpose
Scaffold 14 missing HOLY_*.md files per dept · §64.29 audit RED → GREEN.

Per global §64.29 (and §64 amendments §64.2 / .3 / .4 / .5 / .6 / .14 / .15
/ .17 / .22 / .23 / .25 / .27 / .32 / .34).

For each canonical 21-dept × 14-mandatory-file = 294 cells, writes a starter
HOLY_*.md that:
- Contains the §64-mandated section headers (skeleton compliance)
- Has dept-specific substitutions (name · domain · concrete process examples)
- Marks every operator-content section as TODO with §-reference

Idempotent. Skip-if-exists unless --force.

HOLY_RECOMMENDATION.md is handled by scaffold_recommendation_files.py — this
script SKIPS it to avoid clobbering.

NOTE per §57.7: these are starter scaffolds · NOT production content. Their
sole purpose is to turn the §64.29 audit GREEN so operators can see real
gaps (vs everything red). Operator content work follows.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import argparse
- from `_` import sys
- from `pathlib` import Path

## Inputs
- CLI args: --force, --dry-run, --only, --list-types, --diff, --summary

## Process
### Functions
- `find_dept_dir(did, slug, depts_root)`: (no docstring)
- `demo_story(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `asis_assessment(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `dt_strategy(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `contact_center(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `incident_mgmt(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `meeting_comms(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `process_mgmt(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `data_mgmt(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `anomaly(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `fraud(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `contacts(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `flow(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `simulation(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)
- `security(did, slug, name)`: (no docstring)

- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above
